---
title: "Macey Hartmann"
image: HartmannMaceyHeadshot[247].jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/macey-hartmann-ba6b4b237
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/maceyhartmann
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:maceyhartmann@ucsb.edu
---

Hi there! My name is Macey and I'm from Saratoga, California. This site is a portfolio of my professional and academic experience. Thanks for visiting, I hope you enjoy!
